title: Thai-Style Scallion Buns
description: Soft, fluffy buns infused with the flavors of Thailand, perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and yeast.
Gradually add warm water, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut into desired shapes and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush with garlicky sauce and sprinkle with chopped scallions.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Brush with cooking oil once removed from oven.
